key_evidence: 2026 World Press Freedom Index: India 157/180, down 6 places from 151st in 2025 — first-time benchmark documentation
Modi Norway press confrontation (May 18-20): Modi refused questions, Norwegian journalist publicly challenged officials on human rights record
International coverage (Al Jazeera, Newslaundry) frames as emblematic of India's press freedom trajectory
Carry-forward HRW/RSF documentation of religious minority attacks and narrowing journalism space
Boundary proximity: research 21.4 is only 1.4pt above Critical/Developing boundary — boundary-watch warranted
